# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Accesses a value in the row you select by a column identifier.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript<T>(columnID: ColumnID<T>) -> T? { get set }
```

## Parameters

- **columnID**: The identifier of a column.

## Accessing Elements

- **subscript(_:)**: Accesses a value at a column index.
- **subscript(_:)**: Accesses a value in the row you select by a column name.
- **subscript(_:_:)**: Accesses a value in the row you select by a column name and type.
- **subscript(_:_:)**: Accesses a value in the row you select by a column index and type.

items.description: Accesses a value at a column index.

items.description: Accesses a value in the row you select by a column name.
